title: Concept
description: A business entity or thing in the ontology. Represents a named class from one of the three bounded contexts (SDS, PF, Common). This is the central entity of the domain model; most other entities relate to it.

context.description: Bounded context origin (SDS, PF, or Common).

uri.description: Full IRI uniquely identifying this concept.

summary.description: Short hint (1 sentence). Sourced from rdfs:comment.

abstract.description: Whether this concept is abstract (cannot be instantiated directly).

labelProperty.description: Property used as the display label for instances of this concept.

subjectArea.description: URI of the subject area this concept belongs to (1).

properties.description: URIs of properties attached to this concept (0..*).

enumeration.description: URI of the enumeration associated with this concept (0..1).

mappings.description: URIs of cross-domain mappings involving this concept (0..*).

roleOf.description: URI of the concept this is a role of (0..1).

phaseOf.description: URI of the concept this is a phase of (0..1).

disjointWith.description: URIs of concepts this is disjoint with (0..*).

actions.description: URIs of action descriptions applicable to this concept (0..*).

rules.description: URIs of rules that materialise derived properties for this concept (0..*).

examples.description: URIs of instance examples illustrating this concept (0..*).
